final_prompt.prompt:
Create a comprehensive UI design system in classic minimal tech style, covering web dashboard, mobile interfaces, cards, buttons, and controls for high-impact visual hierarchy and strong tech aesthetic.

Style/medium: comprehensive UI design system in classic minimal tech aesthetic, clean geometric precision with layered depth
Composition: multi-panel showcase layout — dashboard view, mobile screen mockup, component grid with cards, button variants, and control library
Subject: 
  - Web dashboard: data visualization panels, metric widgets, navigation sidebar
  - Mobile interface: phone frame with app screens showing key flows
  - Card components: content cards, stat cards, feature cards with subtle elevation
  - Button library: primary/secondary/ghost states, icon buttons, CTA variants
  - Controls: toggles, sliders, inputs, dropdowns, progress indicators
Scene/backdrop: neutral canvas with subtle grid lines suggesting design workspace
Lighting/mood: crisp directional lighting creating depth through shadow layers, the focused clarity of a design tool interface
Color palette: deep space black and slate grays anchored by electric blue accent, with occasional cyan and white for hierarchy
Materials/textures: matte glass surfaces with subtle blur, crisp vector edges, micro-shadows creating floating depth
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: all components must be consistent within the same design language, clear visual hierarchy across all states, scalable system architecture
Avoid: cluttered information density, inconsistent corner radii, decorative gradients without purpose, skeuomorphic textures, 8K stuffer language
